episodes.title: FULL: Hillary Clinton's deposition on Epstein released by House Oversight committee
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee released the full depositions of former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and former President Bill Clinton centered on the committee’s investigation into the Epstein files on Monday.

The release of their testimonies come after the pair separately testified before the committee in closed-door meetings last week. The footage shared showed that the couple faced more than four hours of questioning each.

Hillary maintained that she had never even met Epstein throughout the deposition.

In her opening statement, Hillary accused the committee of using her and her husband as a distraction from President Donald Trump, who is heavily mentioned in the government documents.

Read more: https://wjactv.com/news/nation-world/oversight-committee-posts-full-clinton-depositions-on-epstein-files-after-talks

episodes.title: DOJ declares full release of Epstein Files, but list of 300 names sparks backlash
episodes.description:
Attorney General Pam Bondi announced in a letter to Congress that the Justice Department has released what she described as “all” of the Jeffrey Epstein files, saying the agency has fulfilled its obligations under the Epstein Transparency Act.
READ MORE: https://wjactv.com/news/nation-world/doj-declares-full-release-of-epstein-files-but-list-of-300-names-sparks-bipartisan-backlash-pam-bondi-elvis-madonna-princess-dianna-marilyn-monroe-kurt-cobain-larry-nasser-janis-joplin-thomas-massie-ro-khanna-lutnick-wasserman-andrew
